data.title: Nomo no Kuni
data.synopsis:
Once upon a time, there was a girl named Sora. She loved to sing, but one day, something happened that made her scared to sing in front of others. As days passed, she forgot how to sing, and even how to laugh. Then, one day, she and her little brother Daichi stumbled upon a mysterious pond.

(Source: Official site, translated)
data.background: Released by Panasonic Group for Expo 2025.

data.title: Medalist 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
Ever since the novice coach Tsukasa Akeuraji took Inori Yuitsuka under his mentorship, she has improved her figure skating at a fast pace. After passing a qualifying badge test, she earns a spot to compete in the upcoming Chubu Block Tournament, where only five of the 15 competitors can move forward to the next stage—the prestigious All-Japan Novice Tournament. However, earning a slot will not be easy for Inori: most of her rivals have already experienced trying their luck in the competition.

The stakes are high as the competition begins, and one by one, each of the competitors strive to perform their very best in front of the big crowd. Moreover, the current figure skating generation's prodigy, Hikaru Kamisaki, is not competing in this block, which raises everyone's determination to qualify. That includes Inori, who must beat the odds if she wants to keep her promise to reach Hikaru and represent Japan in the Olympics with Tsukasa.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Medalist 2nd Season aired on TV Asahi's NUMAnimation block.

titles.title: 地縛少年花子くん2 後編

data.title: Jibaku Shounen Hanako-kun 2 Part 2
data.title_japanese: 地縛少年花子くん2 後編
data.synopsis:
Due to frequent misadventures with the supernatural and her hectic school life, Nene Yashiro can barely catch a break until Kamome Academy's annual sleepover event comes around. Nene is excited to blow off some steam with her best friend Aoi Akane and the rest of her class at the get-together. Unbeknownst to her, the sleepover falls on the same date as Urabon, when the line between the dead and the living gets distorted, allowing wicked spirits to come out to the surface.

When an evil ghost is about to attack her, Nene is rescued by a mysterious figure: Shinigami, the Sixth Wonder that can trap souls using his flute. In that moment, Shinigami takes notice of Aoi and abducts her to use her as a sacrifice that will close the barrier for good. Joined by Hanako-kun and Akane Aoi, Nene must embark on a journey into the deepest confines of the world of the dead to save her best friend before it is too late.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Osananajimi to wa Love Comedy ni Naranai
No More Love With the Girls.
幼馴染とはラブコメにならない
You Can't Be In a Rom-Com with Your Childhood Friends!

data.title: Osananajimi to wa Love Comedy ni Naranai
data.title_english: You Can't Be In a Rom-Com with Your Childhood Friends!
data.title_japanese: 幼馴染とはラブコメにならない
title_synonyms: No More Love With the Girls.
data.synopsis:
As a romantic comedy enthusiast, Yonosuke "Eiyuu" Sakai enjoys the stories about childhood friends the most. But he solemnly believes that the flawless, loving childhood friends from his stories exist only in fiction. Though he has two childhood friends of his own—Shio Minamo and Akari Hiodoshi—Eiyuu has never seen either one of them as anything more.

However, now that they are all in high school together, the beauty of the two girls begins to catch Eiyuu's eye. As his interest subtly grows, the girls start to make advances toward him regardless of time or place—but only time will tell if Eiyuu will ever overcome his denial and finally see the girls in another light.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Tooi-san wa Seishun Shitai! Baka to Smartphone to Romance to
遠井さんは青春したい！『バカとスマホとロマンスと』

data.title: Tooi-san wa Seishun Shitai! Baka to Smartphone to Romance to
data.title_japanese: 遠井さんは青春したい！『バカとスマホとロマンスと』
data.synopsis:
Tooi, an ordinary high school girl, was expecting a normal school life—until everything changed on her very first day.

After catching the attention of the unpredictable and overly energetic classmate Jel, she's suddenly roped into the mysterious "Youth Romance Club," a bizarre school group dedicated to chasing down anything that feels "youthful" or "romantic."

What should've been a carefree club quickly spirals into chaotic antics, with Tooi constantly playing the straight man to everyone's nonsense. To make things even wilder, the club's antics start getting streamed online!

Between laughter, unexpected twists, and even a mysterious incident, this unpredictable school life is just getting started.

(Source: MAL News)
